pages.text: $(bold)crystalCombatCooldownSeconds$(): seconds a Crystal Heart is blocked after taking or dealing damage. Supreme hearts ignore this. Default 30. Range 0 to 600.
$(bold)crystalUsageCooldownSeconds$(): seconds between successful Crystal Heart uses. Supreme hearts ignore this. Default 180. Range 0 to 3600.
$(bold)heartRecoveryMode$(): which items restore lost max hearts. Values: crystal, apple, both, none. Default crystal.
$(bold)appleCombatCooldown$(): if true, golden apples cannot restore hearts in combat. Enchanted apples ignore this. Default false.
$(bold)appleCooldownSeconds$(): seconds between golden apple heart restores. Enchanted apples ignore this. Default 0. Range 0 to 3600.
